frontmatter.description: Browser is rejecting cross-origin requests due to a CORS configuration error

signature.embedding_seed: cors misconfig cross origin preflight access control

body:
## When this fires
A browser refuses to load a cross-origin request because the response is missing the right Access-Control headers. Often introduced by a gateway change, a new domain that was not added to the allow-list, or credentials/wildcard incompatibility.

## Playbook
1. Read cors-config-current to confirm the allowed origins, methods, and credentials flag.
2. Pull preflight-request-log to capture the exact OPTIONS request the browser sent.
3. Look at recent-deploys-gateway for changes to the CORS middleware or routing.
